cumulant_audit.result: all cumulant coefficients through epsilon^10 agree exactly

proof_boundary: This artifact proves the epsilon-ten partition algebra, formal partition nonvanishing, formal logarithm recomposition bounds, and exact Cauchy reductions to two explicit unit-disk partition residual targets. It does not prove those exact central or tail residuals, the exact cumulant corridors, curvature ray, order-four entry, PF-infinity, RH, or Lambda<=0.
remaining_target: Prove the unit-disk exact-minus-formal partition residual below 1/(100000*q^3) on 2<=u<=20 and below 1/(20000*u*q^3) on u>=20, with central and two-tail terms separated.

rows.claim: The exact cumulant generating function factors into the Gaussian term and one Gaussian-factored partition A_u(z).
Exact graded recurrences give the Gaussian-factored partition P^[10] and logarithm S^[10] through epsilon ten.

diagnostics.result: all cumulant coefficients through epsilon^10 agree exactly

rows.formula: P^[10]=1+sum_(n=1)^10 epsilon^n Z_n; S^[10]=sum_(n=1)^10 epsilon^n S_n

rows.claim: Global normalized-jet caps and exact coefficient norms keep the epsilon-ten formal partition uniformly away from zero on the unit disk.
rows.proof_boundary: Formal partition only; not the exact density partition.

rows.claim: An exact positive majorant recurrence controls the formal log recomposition tail on the finite interval.
A fixed-radius majorant and q-growth control the formal log recomposition tail on the asymptotic ray.
A small exact-minus-formal partition residual implies nonvanishing and a controlled logarithmic residual on the unit disk.
rows.proof_boundary: Exact complex inequality under the displayed residual hypothesis.

rows.claim: Cauchy's estimate converts one unit-disk logarithmic residual bound into simultaneous cumulant bounds through order eight.
The displayed finite exact partition residual is sufficient for every epsilon-ten cumulant budget on 2<=u<=20.
rows.proof_boundary: Sufficient target only; the partition residual is not proved here.

rows.claim: The displayed asymptotic exact partition residual is sufficient for every epsilon-ten cumulant budget on u>=20.
rows.proof_boundary: Sufficient target only; the partition residual is not proved here.

rows.claim: Prove the exact partition residual by subtracting P^[10] inside the central integral and bounding the left and right tails separately.
rows.formula: central partition residual + exact left tail + exact right tail + formal Gaussian tails
rows.proof_boundary: Open exact-density theorem; no cumulant corridor is asserted.

status: exact complex-disk reduction with open partition residual
